runners.formComment: Looks close to another win after his success on March 25 at Sale over 510m. Last start was third over 510m in 28.90, behind Daintree Sniper. Capable of improvement.

runners.formComment: Has finished in the money at her last three runs, the latest when second (24.81) at Sale. Has a low draw. Top-three aspirations.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Turned head and visibly eased in home straight.

runners.formComment: Solid performance after racing just off the speed to win by 0.8 lengths at Bendigo over 500m (28.41) beating Utah Icon in Grade 5 on March 13. Rates among the chances this time.

runners.formComment: Has finished seventh at her last couple of starts, most recently at Warragul over 460m. Failed to threaten last start and looks tested again.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (29.97) when eighth over 515m at this track in a Grade 5 FIN. Starts from box 5 for the first time here. Looks suited and should go close.

runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th over 510m at Sale beaten 14 lengths (29.82) behind Daintree Sniper in a Grade 5 on April 12. Looks a strong winning hope.
